zh.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可拉文哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Spring Jr.於1430年出生在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆時，他的父親Thomas Spring45歲，母親Agnes Morginson40歲。他於大約1455年與Margaret Appleton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年9月7日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆。

zh-hans.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可拉文哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Spring Jr.于1430年出生在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas Spring45岁，母亲Agnes Morginson40岁。他于大约1455年与Margaret Appleton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1486年9月7日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Spring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a young man, from Middle English, Old English spring ‘young growth’. The word is first recorded in the 16th century, but is quite likely much older. Compare Springett .
English: topographic name from Middle English, Old English spring, used for someone who lived by a plantation of young trees or (less often) a spring of water.

German and Danish: from Middle High German sprinc, Middle Low German sprink ‘spring, well’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or well, or a habitational name from Springe near Hanover.

variants.name: Sprung
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Achim, Gerhard.
German: from Middle High German sprunc ‘spring’, a topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or well (see also Spring 3, Sprang ).

variants.name: Springett
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a plantation of young trees, a copse, from an unrecorded Middle English, Old English springet. Compare Spring .
perhaps a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English diminutive of   Spring  , ‘young man’.

variants.name: Springs
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Spring with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Spring Jr. was born in 1430, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Spring, was 45 and his mother, Agnes Morginson, was 40. He married Margaret Appleton about 1455. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 September 1486, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Spring Jr. est né en 1430, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Spring, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnes Morginson, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Appleton environ 1455. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1486, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Spring Jr. 1430 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Spring 45 und seine Mutter Agnes Morginson 40. Er hat um 1455 Margaret Appleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. September 1486 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lavenham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Spring Jr. è nato il nel 1430 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Spring, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Morginson, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Appleton circa 1455. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1486, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

ja.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクラベンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Spring Jr.が1430年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Springは45歳，母Agnes Morginsonは40歳であった。約1455年にMargaret Appletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年9月7日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクラベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Spring Jr.(이)가 1430년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Spring(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Morginson(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1455년 Margaret Appleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 9월 7일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Spring Jr. nasceu em 1430, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Spring, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Morginson, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Appleton aproximadamente 1455. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1486, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Spring Jr. родился в 1430 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Spring было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Morginson, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Appleton около 1455 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 сентября 1486 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Spring Jr. nació en 1430, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Spring, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agnes Morginson, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Margaret Appleton aproximadamente 1455. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1486, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
